description: The provided image displays a generic software-interface element labeled Check for updates with a circular icon containing a red bookmark symbol. It lacks any scientific data, material micrographs, diffraction patterns, spectroscopic peaks, or mechanical curves relevant to low-alloy steel recrystallization. The caption is empty and no citation sentences are provided. Although the accompanying text extraction summary details multi-stage dynamic recrystallization under constant and transient hot-compression conditions—including flow-stress responses, DRX fraction evolutions, EBSD-reconstructed prior-austenite grain sizes, and 3D cellular-automaton predictions for samples deformed at 850–1150 °C and strain rates of 0.01–10 s⁻¹—the visual content cannot be linked to any specific figure, sample ID, or experimental result reported therein. Consequently, no material system, processing condition, phase constituent, grain-size trend, or performance metric can be visually verified or inferred from the image itself, and the figure’s role in supporting the paper’s core conclusions remains undetermined.
